scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts Main out/preview-720p.mp4 --codec h264 --image-format jpeg --jpeg-quality 90
scripts.render:preview: remotion render src/index.ts Main out/preview-720p.mp4 --codec h264 --image-format jpeg --jpeg-quality 90
scripts.render:4k: remotion render src/index.ts Main4K out/final-4k.mp4 --codec h264 --image-format png --crf 12
